Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).

Server-resident pieces of the management surface that need only the REST server machinery: the /loggers runtime log-level endpoint (JUL) and the /threaddump / /heapdump diagnostic dumps. Each ships in both a composable *Mixin and a routed *Resource flavor sharing a single worker, mirroring the health package.

Exposure policy (deny-by-default for mutating/sensitive ops): the /loggers read endpoints are always on, but the set-level writes are deny-by-default via LoggersSettings; the /threaddump and /heapdump diagnostics are deny-by-default via DumpsSettings. No auth provider is auto-wired — a consumer opts each sensitive op in explicitly by registering the corresponding settings bean.

The /metrics Micrometer-registry adapter lives in the juneau-rest-server-metrics-micrometer module; the /info endpoint and the convenience BasicActuatorGroup assembly live in the juneau-microservice module, where the manifest/build metadata they surface is available.

Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.logging
    Opt-in non-JUL LogBackend adapters for the /loggers management endpoint.
  • Class
    Description
    DumpsManager
    Shared worker for the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    DumpsMixin
    Mixin flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    DumpsResource
    Child-resource flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    DumpsSettings
    Deny-by-default exposure settings for the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    DumpsSettings.Builder
    Builder for DumpsSettings.
    JulLogBackend
    LogBackend implementation for java.util.logging (JUL).
    LogBackend
    SPI behind the /loggers management endpoint: reads and sets logger levels for one concrete logging backend at runtime.
    LoggersManager
    Shared worker for the /loggers management endpoint: reads and sets logger levels at runtime by delegating to the LogBackend resolved from the host context.
    LoggersMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.
    LoggersResource
    Child-resource flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.
    LoggersSettings
    Exposure settings for the /loggers endpoint.
    LoggersSettings.Builder
    Builder for LoggersSettings.
